mapper.select: SELECT transaction_id as transactionId, account_number as accountNumber, transaction_type as transactionType, amount, balance, description, transaction_date as transactionDate, transaction_status as transactionStatus, reference_number as referenceNumber, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM DEPOSIT_TRANSACTION_TBL WHERE account_number = #{accountNumber} AND transaction_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY transaction_date DESC

SELECT transaction_id as transactionId, account_number as accountNumber, transaction_type as transactionType, amount, balance, description, transaction_date as transactionDate, transaction_status as transactionStatus, reference_number as referenceNumber, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM SAVINGS_TRANSACTION_TBL WHERE account_number = #{accountNumber} AND transaction_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY transaction_date DESC

SELECT transaction_id as transactionId, account_number as accountNumber, transaction_type as transactionType, amount, balance, description, transaction_date as transactionDate, transaction_status as transactionStatus, reference_number as referenceNumber, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM DEPOSIT_TRANSACTION_TBL WHERE transaction_id = #{transactionId}

SELECT transaction_id as transactionId, account_number as accountNumber, transaction_type as transactionType, amount, balance, description, transaction_date as transactionDate, transaction_status as transactionStatus, reference_number as referenceNumber, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM SAVINGS_TRANSACTION_TBL WHERE transaction_id = #{transactionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DEPOSIT_TRANSACTION_TBL ( account_number, transaction_type, amount, balance, description, transaction_date, transaction_status, reference_number, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{accountNumber}, #{transactionType}, #{amount}, #{balance}, #{description}, #{transactionDate}, #{transactionStatus}, #{referenceNumber}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO SAVINGS_TRANSACTION_TBL ( account_number, transaction_type, amount, balance, description, transaction_date, transaction_status, reference_number, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{accountNumber}, #{transactionType}, #{amount}, #{balance}, #{description}, #{transactionDate}, #{transactionStatus}, #{referenceNumber}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL SET balance = #{balance}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE account_number = #{accountNumber}
UPDATE SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL SET balance = #{balance}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE account_number = #{accountNumber}
UPDATE deposit_account_tbl SET account_status = 'CLOSED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE account_number = #{accountNumber} AND account_status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE savings_account_tbl SET account_status = 'CLOSED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE account_number = #{accountNumber} AND account_status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transaction_tbl ( account_number, transaction_type, amount, currency, comment, customer_name, account_type, transaction_date ) VALUES ( #{accountNumber}, #{transactionType}, #{amount}, 'KRW', #{transactionDescription}, #{customerName}, #{accountType}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT account_number FROM account_tbl WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} and status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT account_number, customer_id, account_password, account_status, product_id, balance, created_at, updated_at FROM deposit_account_tbl WHERE account_number = #{accountNumber}
SELECT account_number, customer_id, account_password, account_status, product_id, balance, created_at, updated_at FROM savings_account_tbl WHERE account_number = #{accountNumber}
